stories.title: Mercedes Confirms Spa Software Bug — Energy Harvest Glitch Hurt Both Cars

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
CONFIRMED: Mercedes had a software bug at Spa.

Over-delivered energy early in the lap — ran out between T1 and T5.

Russell lost 0.2-0.25 sec/lap in qualifying. Antonelli hit too.

Bug started at Silverstone. Misdiagnosed as driving style. It wasn't.

#F1 #Mercedes

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Mercedes energy harvest bug misled the team for two race weekends.

Hungarian GP starts Thursday.

If it's not fixed, Antonelli enters summer break with a hidden deficit.

Big problem heading into Budapest.

#F1 #Mercedes

article.headline: Mercedes Confirms Software Bug Hurt Both Cars at Spa — And Hungarian GP Starts Thursday

stories.title: Hungarian GP Preview — Hamilton's 8-Win Fortress, 31°C Forecast, Last Race Before Break

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Hungarian GP. 🇭🇺 July 26. 31°C.

Hamilton: 8 wins at the Hungaroring (all-time record).
Antonelli: +45 pts heading in.
McLaren: back-to-back 1-2 finishes in 2024 and 2025.

Last race before summer break. Everything resets Sunday.

#F1 #HungarianGP

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Toto Wolff pre-Hungary: "We need to execute a clean, reliable weekend."

After confirming a software bug hit both cars at Spa, that's not just coach speak.

Antonelli. Hamilton. Russell. Budapest decides the summer narrative.

#F1 #HungarianGP

article.headline: Hungarian GP Preview: Hamilton's 8-Win Stage, 31°C Forecast, and Antonelli Eyeing a Statement Going into the Break

stories.title: McLaren's "Macarena" Wing and Aston Martin's Full B-Spec — Biggest Upgrade Day of 2026

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Two teams. Two huge upgrades. Same weekend.

McLaren: new floor + upside-down "Macarena" rear wing (FP1 only)
Aston Martin: full B-spec after 10 rounds with zero upgrades

Stroll: "If Hungary goes wrong, a new engine won't be enough."

#F1 #HungarianGP

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
McLaren's experimental rear wing is nicknamed "Macarena." It runs upside-down.

FP1 only. Won't race at Hungary.

But the data could reshape their aero for the rest of 2026.

Meanwhile, Aston Martin is debuting an entirely new car Thursday.

#F1 #McLaren

article.headline: McLaren's "Macarena" Wing and Aston Martin's Full B-Spec: The Biggest Upgrade Day of the 2026 F1 Season

stories.title: Verstappen's Exit Clause Is Active — Loyalty Statement from Manager, October Deadline Looms

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Verstappen's Red Bull exit clause is now active.

Manager Vermeulen: "We want to continue — but with the chance to win."

McLaren: closed. Mercedes: crowded. Aston Martin: Newey link.

October deadline. Summer break starts Sunday.

#F1 #Verstappen

stories.title: F1 Standings at Halftime — Antonelli 45 Clear, Hamilton vs. Russell Just 5 Points Apart

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
F1 standings at summer break:

1. Antonelli: 204 pts (6W/6P)
2. Hamilton: 159 pts
3. Russell: 154 pts — 5 back
4. Leclerc: 126 pts
7. Verstappen: 91 pts

Mercedes leads Ferrari by 73 in constructors.

Hungary starts Thursday.

#F1 #HungarianGP

article.headline: F1 Championship Standings at Halftime: Antonelli 45 Clear, Hamilton and Russell Separated by Only 5 Points
